title: Coins
description: A Minecraft mod that adds new coins and a currency system for trading between players
body:
## Simple 5-Coin Currency Mod

### Overview

This mod introduces a lightweight and easy-to-use currency system into Minecraft.
It adds five custom coins designed for simple trading, shops, and in-game economy without complicating the gameplay.

### Features

- Five coin types: Copper, Iron, Gold, Emerald, Diamond.
- Progressive crafting recipes (each coin crafted from 4 of the previous tier).
- Compatible with survival and multiplayer – ideal for servers with player shops.
- Balanced values for smooth progression.

### Crafting

- 4 × Copper Coins → 1 × Iron Coin
- 4 × Iron Coins → 1 × Gold Coin
- 4 × Gold Coins → 1 × Emerald Coin
- 4 × Emerald Coins → 1 × Diamond Coin
- 4 × Diamond Coins → 1 × Netherite Coin
  
All recipes appear in the crafting book automatically.

### Compatibility

- Works with Forge/Fabric servers if the mod is installed on both client and server.
- No other mods required.

### 🛠 Future Plans

- More coin tiers (Netherite, Platinum…)
- Custom textures and sound effects
- Integration with trading plugins and NPC shop mods.

## ☕ Support the Developer

If you enjoy Coins and want to support my work, consider helping me continue creating free mods for everyone ❤️

[![Buy me a coffee](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b888841adf2a7d4d76c5274d634c205ee88e9e20.png)](https://ko-fi.com/novaxi)
